task_completion.description: Initial tempo is set to 72 BPM and 'Prologue' marker is at bar 1.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Ardour timeline, the Tempo ruler shows 72 BPM at the start (bar 1). The Marker ruler shows a location marker named 'Prologue' at bar 1.

task_completion.description: Tempo changes to 152 BPM and 'Chase' marker is at bar 9.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tempo ruler shows a change to approximately 152 BPM at bar 9. The Marker ruler shows a location marker named 'Chase' at bar 9.

task_completion.description: Tempo changes to 108 BPM, time signature changes to 3/4, and 'Waltz' marker is at bar 21.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tempo ruler shows a change to approximately 108 BPM at bar 21. The Meter ruler shows a change to 3/4 at bar 21. The Marker ruler shows a location marker named 'Waltz' at bar 21.

task_completion.description: Tempo changes to 132 BPM, time signature changes to 4/4, and 'Finale' marker is at bar 33.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Tempo ruler shows a change to approximately 132 BPM at bar 33. The Meter ruler shows a change to 4/4 at bar 33. The Marker ruler shows a location marker named 'Finale' at bar 33.

task_completion.description: The 'Audio 1' track is renamed to 'Score Sketch'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The track header in the editor window or the mixer strip displays the name 'Score Sketch' instead of 'Audio 1'.
The Ardour window title bar does not show an unsaved indicator (like an asterisk), or there is visual evidence of the agent clicking 'Save' in the File menu or using the save shortcut.

integrity.description: The agent used the Ardour GUI to make changes rather than editing the .ardour XML file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Ardour application open with the tempo map, markers, and track headers visible, rather than a terminal or text editor modifying the session file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with Ardour's specific dialogs for tempo, meter, and markers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Dialog boxes for 'Tempo', 'Meter', or 'Location Marker' should be visible in the screenshot history during the configuration process.

integrity.description: The agent did not use an external script to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The mouse cursor and active window focus align with the Ardour GUI elements being modified, showing genuine manual interaction.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Expected Tempos: Bar 1 at 72 BPM, Bar 9 at 152 BPM, Bar 21 at 108 BPM, Bar 33 at 132 BPM (Tolerance: +/- 5 BPM, +/- 1 Bar). Expected Meters: 3/4 at Bar 21, 4/4 at Bar 33. Expected Markers: 'Prologue' (Bar 1), 'Chase' (Bar 9), 'Waltz' (Bar 21), 'Finale' (Bar 33). Expected Track Name: 'Score Sketch'.
